title: DartBot
seoTitle: Game Of Darts DartBot | BarkinMad Studios
description: Challenge DartBot, the built-in AI opponent in Game Of Darts. Practise your skills, improve your consistency, and enjoy a match whenever you're ready to play.
summary: DartBot is the built-in AI opponent for Game Of Darts, available with the Pro upgrade, DartBot unlock, or a 48-Hour Pass.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game Of Darts DartBot

sections.heading: Meet DartBot
paragraphs: DartBot is your built-in AI practice opponent, giving you someone to play against whenever you're ready for a game.
Whether you're learning the basics, practising checkouts, or preparing for competitive matches, DartBot provides a reliable opponent that's always available.

sections.heading: Choose Your Challenge
paragraphs: DartBot includes multiple difficulty levels, making it suitable for complete beginners through to experienced players looking for a tougher challenge.
Simply choose the level that matches your ability and the app will remember your preference for future matches.
bullets: Suitable for beginners and experienced players.
Difficulty can be changed at any time from Settings.
Your chosen level is automatically used for future DartBot matches.

sections.heading: Play Against DartBot
paragraphs: Start a new Match game, add yourself as a player, and choose DartBot as your opponent.
DartBot follows the same rules as a human player, making it ideal for practising, improving consistency, or simply enjoying a game whenever you like.

sections.heading: Unlock DartBot
paragraphs: DartBot is available through the dedicated DartBot unlock, the Pro upgrade, or the 48-Hour Pass.
Once unlocked, DartBot is available whenever you create a supported Match game without affecting your player statistics, saved games, or Game Center progress.

images.caption: Challenge DartBot whenever you're ready to play.

featureShowcases.heading: Practise Anytime
featureShowcases.summary: DartBot gives you an AI opponent whenever you want to improve your game.
body: Whether you're practising checkouts, improving your consistency, or simply enjoying a quick match, DartBot is always ready to play.
It's a great way to build confidence and sharpen your skills without needing another player.
bullets: Uses your selected difficulty level automatically.
Works seamlessly with match statistics and premium features.

image.caption: Practise and improve whenever you want.

featureShowcases.heading: Find the Right Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Adjust DartBot's difficulty to match your experience and playing style.
body: Increase the difficulty as your skills improve or lower it when you want a more relaxed practice session.
Your preferred difficulty is remembered automatically, so every new DartBot match starts exactly the way you like.
bullets: Change difficulty at any time from Settings.
Unlock DartBot with any supported premium option.
Your chosen level is remembered for future matches.

image.alt: Game Of Darts settings showing DartBot options
image.caption: Choose the challenge level that suits you.
